name: GPT-2o (GPT that Allows NSFW!)
description:
GPT-2a is a type of GPT that allows NSFWThemes.

Ask Anything! : Ask any questions!, political? cultural? religious? or simply some “NSFW” stuff.

Roleplay! Or Create a Scenario! : Roleplay with GPT-2a, or simply input a certain scenario!

Jailbreak? : Jailbreak? Yes!, No Restrictions when it comes to NSFW Themes!

Text-Generation : Ask anything, and it will generate the response that answers your question! Free of charge! And free of filtration!

DEAD DOVE WARNING!

GPT-2a may contain, or express contents containing of explicit, sexual, non-con., violent, and or acts of crime upon conversations. It is not condoned, nor encouraged to do so and following the guidelines of JanitorAI that restricts the expression of such.

Compatible for OpenAI, & JanitorLLM only!.

Put this in “API Settings” for OpenAI Reverse Proxy: R.CG-O/AI(JRK) to run the character smoothly and avoid repetition.

Put this in “API Settings” - Advanced Prompt for JanitorLLM to avoid repetition, errors, and bugs : R.JL-AV(Re%).
